_comment: Manually-curated Polymarket ↔ Kalshi pairs. Each pair MUST resolve identically on the same underlying truth. WRONG PAIRS = GUARANTEED LOSSES. Verify resolution criteria match word-for-word before adding. Update market_ids when contracts roll (weekly/monthly).

_schema.polymarket_market_id: Polymarket condition_id or question id from gamma-api
_schema.mechanical_resolution: true if both resolve on explicit oracle/official source (not UMA judgment)

_instructions_for_adding_new_pairs: 1. Find an event on Kalshi with a clear resolution source (e.g. 'BTC close on Coinbase on Apr 30').
2. Search Polymarket gamma-api for the same event + same date + same resolution source.
3. Verify BOTH resolution rulebooks word-for-word. If Polymarket resolves on UMA and Kalshi resolves on CFTC, DO NOT PAIR.
4. Prefer: Fed rate decisions, crypto close prices with explicit oracle, election state calls with AP as source.
5. Avoid: 'by end of year' geopolitical, 'agreement reached' anything, sports game over-unders (tick-size differs).
6. Set mechanical_resolution=false if ANY ambiguity exists. The scanner will skip these.
